title: Fusion Studies
description: Three independent images that simulate sixteen-input fusion as complete self-contained compositions.
creative_direction: Independent fusion studies: each image visibly synthesizes many source-like cues without requiring external private reference files.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: No references; each image is independent.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.
